global_context.scene_description: A realistic, slightly angled top-down photograph of a kitchen counter in a Phoenix-area home. In the center of the counter lies a printed HVAC quote — a single-page printed document on plain white letterhead. The quote is clearly legible: the top reads 'HVAC REPLACEMENT QUOTE — Complete AC System' and the bottom-right shows 'TOTAL: $14,500' in bold black type with a highlight marker stripe over the price. A homeowner's hand (skin-tone natural, no jewelry, adult male or female) holds a smartphone roughly 12 inches above the quote, camera app open on screen. The phone's display shows the quote framed within the camera viewfinder with a visible white circular capture button at the bottom of the screen. The phone itself is a modern smartphone, held in landscape orientation by the right hand. Surrounding counter details: a matte ceramic coffee mug in the upper-left, a set of car keys with a small keychain in the upper-right, and a pen resting on the edge of the paper. The counter surface is a warm light-grey granite with subtle veining. Soft morning light enters from a window on the left, casting gentle shadows of the phone and hand onto the quote below. Above the scene, across the top 15% of the frame, large bold black sans-serif text reads 'SNAP IT. SEND IT. WE BEAT IT.' against a clean off-white background that blends with the counter. Across the very bottom of the frame, occupying the bottom 12%, is a solid red rectangular banner with bold white sans-serif text reading 'BEAT MY QUOTE →' on the left and the ASH Cooling & Heating logo on the right.

lighting.source: Natural morning window light from left
lighting.direction: Left-side, creating soft diagonal shadows to the right

composition.camera_angle: Top-down with slight 15-degree tilt to show phone screen legibly
composition.framing: Medium overhead — counter fills full frame, phone+quote are focal center
composition.depth_of_field: Deep — phone, quote, and counter all in focus
composition.focal_point: The smartphone capturing the HVAC quote — the ACT of snapping the photo
composition.notes: Reserve top 15% of frame for headline text. Reserve bottom 12% for red CTA banner. Counter scene occupies middle 73%.
